nasb.text: As for those who swear by the guilt of Samaria, Who say, ‘As your god lives, O Dan,’ And, ‘As the way of Beersheba lives,’ They will fall and not rise again.”

esv.text: Those who swear by the Guilt of Samaria, and say, ‘As your god lives, O Dan,’ and, ‘As the Way of Beersheba lives,’ they shall fall, and never rise again.”

cnv.text: 那些指著撒瑪利亞的罪起誓， 或是那些指著但的神， 或別是巴的神起誓的， 他們要倒下，再不能起來。”

ccb.text: 那些凭撒玛利亚、但和别示巴的神明起誓的， 都要跌倒，永不再起来。”
